ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lodgings" (
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lodging property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lodging */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of lodging (e.g., hotel, bed & breakfast) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the lodging (scale of 1-5) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price range indicator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lodging */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude for mapping */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude for mapping */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the lodging's webpage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the lodging */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the lodging */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the lodging can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lodging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traveler, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Total amount paid for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for admin authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging this location is associated with */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the lodging is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the lodging */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging offering this amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging this discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the discount */,
  "code" TEXT /* Discount code */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum stay required for the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "lodging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodging associated with this image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_lodging_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodging_id") REFERENCES lodgings ("lodging_id")
)
